title: After Midnight: A New Dawn
description: You awaken, gasping, in the shattered husk of a stasis pod — no name, no past, only instinct. Beyond the cracked glass, a world ravaged by xenomorphs drowned in darkness. Will you rise as an ember, or fall into the void, just another vessel for conquest.
body:
After-Midnight: New Dawn is a gripping survival modpack crafted for players who crave tension, strategy, and resilience in a world on the brink of collapse. Thrust into a post-apocalyptic wasteland overrun by deadly xenomorphs, you must scavenge, fortify, and survive against relentless alien threats. Every shadow hides danger, and every step beyond shelter demands cunning and courage.

![After Midnight: New Dawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80cc45485707dd6ea0c431105a0c458f710066fc.jpeg)

The modpack transforms Minecraft into a desperate fight for survival, with enhanced combat, terrifying ambushes from facehuggers, and an atmosphere steeped in suspense. Explore abandoned cities, crumbling military bases, and dead wastelands, each filled with scarce resources and grim scenes. Dynamic lighting, chilling soundscapes, and immersive visual overhauls pull you deep into the world’s tension-filled heartbeat.

But survival is just the beginning. After-Midnight: New Dawn pushes you to rebuild — crafting defenses, rallying survivors, and forging the fragile beginnings of a new community. Advanced combat mechanics, modular base-building, and critical resource management add layers of depth and immersion, while cooperative gameplay lets you and your allies carve out hope in a world gone dark. This is more than a survival challenge — it’s a battle for humanity’s last light.

**_Special thanks to the creator of the Covenant mod for giving permission to use their mod in this modpack._**

**To download their mod without this modpack use this link:**

**[Covenant By Pyro_OS](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/covenant)**
